column2: 1. What is your primary mobile operating system?
column3: 2. What is the brand and model of your smartphone? (e.g., Samsung S23, iPhone 14)
column4: 3. Which mobile network provider do you currently use? ( e.g.., MTN, Orange)
column5: 4. On a scale of 1–5, how would you rate your general mobile data (4G/5G) stability?
column6: 5. Do you frequently encounter "Dead Zones" (no signal) during your daily commute?
column7: 6. In which specific areas or neighborhoods do you experience the most signal drops?
column8: 7. On a scale of 1–5, how concerned are you about apps accessing your location in the background?
column9: 8. Would you allow a background app to collect anonymous signal data if it helped your provider fix those dead zones?
column10: 9. Which of these features are most important to you? (Choose all that apply)
column11: 10. How much of your monthly mobile data would you be willing to contribute to these reports?
column12: 11. Would you be willing to leave your GPS "On" while driving or commuting if the app requires it?
